intro: Over a concentrated two-week period in April 2026, ZCyberNews tracked ten articles tagged under Anthropic, with the threat actor Claude Mythos appearing as the most-covered entity. The reporting spanned three critical, four high, one medium, and two informational severity items, affecting technology, critical infrastructure, cybersecurity, ai-development, and financial services sectors globally. These incidents, recorded between April 14 and April 29, highlight the sustained focus on Claude Mythos across multiple high-severity events.
